<mxCell id="_YB9bLEXzcVfjZjgBFuH-96" value="ARCHITECTURE LEGEND" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1841" y="150" width="380" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="_YB9bLEXzcVfjZjgBFuH-97" value="<b>🔷 Two-Stack Deployment:</b><br>1. Resources Stack: DynamoDB, Secrets, SQS, Cognito<br>2. Lambdas Stack: API Gateway WebSocket + Lambdas<br><br><b>🔐 Authentication Flow:</b><br>Client connects with JWT → $connect validates with Cognito → Connection stored in DynamoDB<br><br><b>🔌 WebSocket Routes:</b><br>• $connect (JWT Auth)<br>• $disconnect (Cleanup)<br>• $default (Default handler)<br>• sendMessage, create, update, delete, get, list<br><br><b>🐳 Docker Deployment:</b><br>All Lambdas packaged as Docker images in ECR<br><br><b>📊 Data Flow:</b><br>Client → Azure APIM → API Gateway → Lambda → DynamoDB/SQS/Cognito/Secrets<br><br><b>🔄 CI/CD Pipeline:</b><br>GitLab → Build Docker → Push ECR → Deploy CDK → Run Terraform → Upload Docs" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1861" y="190" width="340" height="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="_YB9bLEXzcVfjZjgBFuH-98" value="" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1976D2;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1841" y="576" width="380" height="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="_YB9bLEXzcVfjZjgBFuH-99" value="KEY FEATURES" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1976D2;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1841" y="586" width="380" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="_YB9bLEXzcVfjZjgBFuH-100" value="<b>✅ Real-Time Communication:</b><br>Bidirectional WebSocket API with custom routes<br><br><b>🔒 Security:</b><br>• JWT validation via Cognito JWKS<br>• Token from query params or headers<br>• Scope-based authorization<br>• Secrets Manager for credentials<br><br><b>💾 Data Storage:</b><br>• Main DynamoDB table (provisioned)<br>• Connections table with TTL cleanup<br>• GSI for user queries<br>• DynamoDB Streams enabled<br><br><b>📝 Audit Trail:</b><br>• SQS queue for all operations<br>• Dead Letter Queue (3 retries)<br>• 14-day retention<br><br><b>🚀 Infrastructure as Code:</b><br>• AWS CDK Python stacks<br>• Terraform for Azure integration<br>• GitLab CI/CD automation<br><br><b>📚 Documentation:</b><br>• AsyncAPI 2.x specification<br>• Auto-generated from code<br>• Hosted on Azure Blob Storage<br>• Linked from APIM portal<br><br><b>🔧 Monitoring:</b><br>• CloudWatch Logs (implicit)<br>• Connection tracking<br>• Audit queue monitoring" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1861" y="626" width="340" height="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="_YB9bLEXzcVfjZjgBFuH-101" value="" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF3E0;strokeColor=#E65100;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1841" y="1179" width="380" height="522" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="_YB9bLEXzcVfjZjgBFuH-102" value="ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#E65100;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1841" y="1200" width="380" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="_YB9bLEXzcVfjZjgBFuH-103" value="<b>Resources Stack Variables:</b><br>• API_NAME<br>• API_VERSION<br>• TABLE<br>• SECRET_NAME<br>• SECRET_VALUE<br>• COGNITO_POOL_ID<br>• SQS_QUEUE_NAME<br>• DEAD_LETTER_QUEUE_NAME<br><br><b>Lambdas Stack Variables:</b><br>• SERVICE_NAME<br>• AWS_ACCOUNT_ID<br>• AWS_ECR_FOLDER<br>• IMAGE_TAG (default: latest)<br>• VAR_EXAMPLE<br>• WEBSOCKET_ENDPOINT_URL<br>• CONNECTIONS_TABLE<br>• REGION<br><br><b>Azure/Terraform Variables:</b><br>• APIM_NAME<br>• APIM_RG<br>• API_PRODUCT<br>• AZ_TENANT_ID<br>• AZ_SUB_ID<br>• AZ_CLIENT_ID<br>• AZ_CLIENT_SECRET<br>• AWS_DEFAULT_REGION<br>• API_SYSTEM_NAME<br>• ENV (dev/prod)<br>• SLS_NAME" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=11;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1861" y="1238" width="340" height="550" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="_YB9bLEXzcVfjZjgBFuH-107" value="⚠️ All Lambda functions use Docker images from ECR for size optimization and custom dependencies" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="_YB9bLEXzcVfjZjgBFuH-108" value="🔒 JWT tokens are validated using Cognito JWKS endpoint. Unauthorized connections return 401/403" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFE0B2;strokeColor=#E65100;fontSize=11;align=left;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="685" y="1030" width="480" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="_YB9bLEXzcVfjZjgBFuH-109" value="⏰ Connections table has TTL enabled for automatic cleanup of stale WebSocket connections" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFE0B2;strokeColor=#E65100;fontSize=11;align=left;fontStyle=1;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="1183" y="1030" width="480" height="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="_YB9bLEXzcVfjZjgBFuH-111" value="" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;strokeWidth=2;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="2230" width="1600" height="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="_YB9bLEXzcVfjZjgBFuH-112" value="DEPLOYMENT WORKFLOW" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#2E7D32;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="120" y="2240" width="1600" height="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="_YB9bLEXzcVfjZjgBFuH-113" value="<b>Step 1: Build & Push</b> → GitLab CI builds Docker image with Kaniko → Push to AWS ECR Repository<br><br><b>Step 2: Deploy Resources Stack</b> → CDK deploys DynamoDB tables (Main + Connections), Secrets Manager, SQS + DLQ, imports Cognito User Pool<br><br><b>Step 3: Deploy Lambdas Stack</b> → CDK deploys 9 Lambda functions from ECR image, creates API Gateway WebSocket API with routes, configures IAM permissions<br><br><b>Step 4: Terraform Azure Integration</b> → Provisions Azure API Management WebSocket API, creates Storage Account, uploads AsyncAPI documentation (HTML/CSS/JS), links documentation to APIM" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=12;" parent="1" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry x="140" y="2280" width="1560" height="110" div.div:
🔷 Two-Stack Deployment:
1. Resources Stack: DynamoDB, Secrets, SQS, Cognito
2. Lambdas Stack: API Gateway WebSocket + Lambdas
🔐 Authentication Flow:
Client connects with JWT → $connect validates with Cognito → Connection stored in DynamoDB
🔌 WebSocket Routes:
• $connect (JWT Auth)
• $disconnect (Cleanup)
• $default (Default handler)
• sendMessage, create, update, delete, get, list
🐳 Docker Deployment:
All Lambdas packaged as Docker images in ECR
📊 Data Flow:
Client → Azure APIM → API Gateway → Lambda → DynamoDB/SQS/Cognito/Secrets
🔄 CI/CD Pipeline:
GitLab → Build Docker → Push ECR → Deploy CDK → Run Terraform → Upload Docs

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(227, 242, 253), rgb(20, 33, 42)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(25, 118, 210), rgb(79, 159, 238));

div.div:
✅ Real-Time Communication:
Bidirectional WebSocket API with custom routes
🔒 Security:
• JWT validation via Cognito JWKS
• Token from query params or headers
• Scope-based authorization
• Secrets Manager for credentials
💾 Data Storage:
• Main DynamoDB table (provisioned)
• Connections table with TTL cleanup
• GSI for user queries
• DynamoDB Streams enabled
📝 Audit Trail:
• SQS queue for all operations
• Dead Letter Queue (3 retries)
• 14-day retention
🚀 Infrastructure as Code:
• AWS CDK Python stacks
• Terraform for Azure integration
• GitLab CI/CD automation
📚 Documentation:
• AsyncAPI 2.x specification
• Auto-generated from code
• Hosted on Azure Blob Storage
• Linked from APIM portal
🔧 Monitoring:
• CloudWatch Logs (implicit)
• Connection tracking
• Audit queue monitoring

div.div:
Resources Stack Variables:
• API_NAME
• API_VERSION
• TABLE
• SECRET_NAME
• SECRET_VALUE
• COGNITO_POOL_ID
• SQS_QUEUE_NAME
• DEAD_LETTER_QUEUE_NAME
Lambdas Stack Variables:
• SERVICE_NAME
• AWS_ACCOUNT_ID
• AWS_ECR_FOLDER
• IMAGE_TAG (default: latest)
• VAR_EXAMPLE
• WEBSOCKET_ENDPOINT_URL
• CONNECTIONS_TABLE
• REGION
Azure/Terraform Variables:
• APIM_NAME
• APIM_RG
• API_PRODUCT
• AZ_TENANT_ID
• AZ_SUB_ID
• AZ_CLIENT_ID
• AZ_CLIENT_SECRET
• AWS_DEFAULT_REGION
• API_SYSTEM_NAME
• ENV (dev/prod)
• SLS_NAME

div.div:
Step 1: Build & Push → GitLab CI builds Docker image with Kaniko → Push to AWS ECR Repository
Step 2: Deploy Resources Stack → CDK deploys DynamoDB tables (Main + Connections), Secrets Manager, SQS + DLQ, imports Cognito User Pool
Step 3: Deploy Lambdas Stack → CDK deploys 9 Lambda functions from ECR image, creates API Gateway WebSocket API with routes, configures IAM permissions
Step 4: Terraform Azure Integration → Provisions Azure API Management WebSocket API, creates Storage Account, uploads AsyncAPI documentation (HTML/CSS/JS), links documentation to APIM
